hero.title: Streamline Your Content Pipeline from Order to Publish
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one workspace for agencies and marketing teams to manage content requests, track progress, and deliver high-quality drafts on time without the chaos.
hero.paneFeedback: Love it! Exactly what our agency needed

product.title: Supercharge your workflow
product.desc: Everything you need to manage tasks, collaborate, and deliver projects on time in one unified platform.

solutions.label: TAILORED SOLUTIONS
solutions.title: Built for every content team
solutions.desc: Whether you are managing clients or scaling your internal blog, ContentOps adapts to your needs.

agencies.title: For Marketing Agencies
agencies.desc: Manage dozens of client requests in one place. Keep clients updated with branded boards and stop chasing emails.

inhouse.title: For In-house Teams
inhouse.desc: Align your marketing department. Request content from internal writers, track approvals, and publish faster.

freelancers.title: For Content Creators
freelancers.desc: Receive clear briefs, submit drafts, and get feedback instantly. No more lost context in Slack messages.

workflow.label: SMARTER WORKFLOWS
workflow.title: Built to scale your content operations.
workflow.desc: Replace messy email threads and scattered spreadsheets with a centralized content operating system designed for speed and clarity.
workflow.f1Desc: Allow clients or team members to request specific content pieces through a structured, easy-to-use ordering system.
workflow.f2Desc: Track every article's status from 'Drafting' to 'Review' to 'Approved' with a single, clear visual board.
workflow.f3Desc: Assign tasks to specific writers, receive instant notifications, and keep everyone completely aligned on deadlines.

whyUs.label: WHY US
whyUs.title: Why marketing teams love ContentOps
whyUs.cardTitle: Never lose track of a content draft again. Everything organized instantly.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.desc: No hidden fees. No surprise charges.

free.name: Starter
free.desc: Perfect for individuals just getting started.

pro.name: Professional
pro.desc: Ideal for small teams and growing businesses.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For large organizations with complex needs.

About.title: Empowering Content Operations
About.subtitle: We help modern marketing teams scale production without sacrificing quality.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: Founded in 2026, ContentOps.ai was built out of frustration with messy spreadsheets and endless Slack feedback loops. We envisioned a centralized content operating system that unites agencies, writers, and clients in a single, transparent workflow.

values.title: Our Values
values.clarityDesc: No hidden feedback, no lost drafts. Everyone knows what to do next.
values.qualityDesc: Automate the overhead so writers can focus on writing their best work.
values.partnershipDesc: We are an extension of your creative team, committed to your growth.

Careers.title: Join Our Mission
Careers.subtitle: We are looking for creative thinkers and builders to shape the future of content operations.

culture.title: Our Culture
culture.desc: We believe in deep focus, async communication, and ownership. We work remotely, support continuous learning, and prioritize well-being.

benefits.title: Benefits & Perks
benefits.remoteDesc: Work from anywhere in the world, on your own schedule.
benefits.learningDesc: Annual allowance for books, courses, and conferences.
benefits.wellnessDesc: Monthly stipend for gym, mental health, or wellness apps.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message.

form.title: Send a Message
form.name: Your Name
form.successDesc: Thank you! We have received your message and will get back to you shortly.
